positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a sleepy crescent moon cradling a stylized constellation of glowing, friendly stars. Below, a group of cheerful, highly simplified geometric woodland creatures—a fox, rabbit, and bear—are gathered on a patch of grass, gazing up. The style should be modern, flat vector illustration meets whimsical mid-century modern poster art. Use a limited, soothing palette of deep sapphire blue, muted sage green, gold mustard yellow, and cream. Strong contrast is achieved through crisp silhouettes and subtle bioluminescent glowing edges (glow effect). The composition must be centered and highly repeatable/print-friendly, perfect for repeating patterns or a central apparel graphic. Clean lines, highly detailed and crisp.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, 3d render, logo, trademark, copyrighted character, celebrity, realistic fur, gradient
